frame_analyses.description: Needle and suture first visible without instruments in engagement.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup phase before task starts, instruments not grasping needle yet.

frame_analyses.description: Needle is being grasped by right-hand driver.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Right-hand driver correctly positioned for loading.

frame_analyses.description: Needle passing through first mark on foam.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: No apparent deviation from mark visible.

frame_analyses.description: First throw of the surgeon's knot initiated.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot appears secure, appropriate tension applied.

frame_analyses.description: Second single throw is being tied.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good hand switching observed, tension applied appropriately.

frame_analyses.description: Third throw completed, changing hand for the procedure.
Suture being cut inside the trainer.

confidence_rationale: Clear visibility of all task phases, suture placements, and knot security with no deviations observed.
technique_summary: Expert performance with smooth instrument handling and knot tying. Excellent suture placement without deviation.
strengths: Effective hand switching enhancing knot security
improvement_suggestions: Maintain the current technique for consistent expert-level outcomes.
Continue practicing to decrease completion time even further.
